tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: भारतीय ररज़र्व बैंक

RESERVE BANK OF INDIA
RBI/DOR/2025-26/241

tasks.title: Implement technical control: 18, Contents Chapter-I Preliminary
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to 18, 2026) table of contents chapter-i preliminary. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: 18, Contents Chapter-I Preliminary
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of '18, Contents Chapter-I Preliminary'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: 18, Contents Chapter-I Preliminary
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that '18, Contents Chapter-I Preliminary' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: 18, Contents Chapter-I Prelimi
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for '18, Contents Chapter-I Preliminary'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Be 'Notes to Accounts' to
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Be 'Notes to Accounts' to'. Document the existing Reporting posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: (i) Penalties imposed by the RBI under the provisions of the (i) BR Act, 1949, (ii)
Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007, and (iii) Government Securities Act,
2006 (for bouncing of SGL) shall be d

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Be 'Notes to Accounts' to
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Be 'Notes to Accounts' to'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Prepare and submit regulatory report: Be 'Notes to Accounts' to
tasks.description: Prepare the regulatory report required under 'Be 'Notes to Accounts' to'. Ensure the report format complies with RBI prescribed templates (XBRL, CIMS, or prescribed return format as applicable). Have the report reviewed and signed by the authorised signatory before submission. Retain a copy of the submitted report and the submission acknowledgement receipt.
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed submission copy and RBI/regulator acknowledgement receipt
tasks.implementation_notes: Late submission attracts regulatory penalty. Set submission reminder 7 days before deadline.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be 'Notes to Accounts' to
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be 'Notes to Accounts' to'. Required evidence types: Submitted Report Copy, Submission Acknowledgement. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Submitted Report Copy, Submission Acknowledgement
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be 'Notes to Accounts' to
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be 'Notes to Accounts' to'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

maps.title: MAP: Make the nature of the

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Make the nature of the
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Make the nature of the'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: (ii) A bank shall make appropriate disclosures on the nature of the breach, number of
instances of default and the quantum of penalty imposed.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Make the nature of the
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to make appropriate disclosures on the nature of the breach, number of instances of default and the quantum of penalty imposed. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Make the nature of the
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Make the nature of the'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Make the nature of the
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Make the nature of the' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Make the nature of the
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Make the nature of the'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
